title: Pastel Bloom
description: A cheerful burst of layered petals, soft sunshine, and playful pastel movement.

title: Moon Garden
description: Dreamy lavender florals and floating garden shapes with a calm, luminous mood.

title: Coastal Rhythm
description: Fresh wave-like marks, coral light, and breezy color made for a bright room.

title: Festival Light
description: A vibrant celebration of petals, confetti marks, and radiant pastel energy.
